mainEntity.name: What proof do I need to show voice assistant optimization is working?

acceptedAnswer.text: The strongest evidence comes from search impressions, featured snippet wins, local pack visibility, and voice-related engagement metrics. If you can track question-based queries in Search Console and conversions from those pages, you have a good signal.
acceptedAnswer.description: Look for rising impressions on question queries, more featured snippet visibility, better local visibility, and conversion lift from optimized pages. Tracking these together is more useful than any single metric.
